chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-287 of 2017. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Agha Faisal, For hearing of main case. 19.01.2022 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the petitioner had qualified the requisite test, therefore, the respondents to be directed to appoint him as Police Constable. Learned A.A.G Sindh while making reference to the comments filed by S.S.P, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, has sought for dismissal of the instant constitutional petition by contending that the petitioner has not qualified the requisite test for his appointment as Police Constable. We have considered the above arguments and perused the record. The controversy, as to whether the petitioner has qualified the requisite test for his appointment as Police Constable or otherwise, being factual could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction by way of instant constitutional petition; the same being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE.
